name: RPlog_Bombardment
title: Bombardment of Cochran
summary: As the battle for Cochran turns, the New Republic fighter squadrons cover a hasty withdrawal: Dagger Leader Johmac's Y-Wing bombers carve out a no-man's-land for the retreating ground troops while Crystal's Ghost Squadron X-Wings and Gene's flight strafe the Imperial walkers and dropships before pulling for space. On the ground, the Griffon veteran Gyzen and the Bothan advisor Demitri realize that with both the Republic and the Empire abandoning the world, something is gravely wrong, and they fight their way north through the ruined capital toward Gyzen's fighter. A garbled cease-fire order from Rodriga halts the fighting just before the Imperials reveal their true intent, opening a Base Delta Zero orbital bombardment that begins cratering the planet's surface. A dismissive local commander brushes off Gyzen's frantic warning to evacuate, and as the fire rains down, Gyzen and Demitri reach the fighter, losing Gyzen's gunner to flying debris, and lift off from the doomed planet.
